datasetStatus: Scope correction in progress; current general-election filing snapshots are time-bounded through July 15, 2026 and primary history is retained separately
scope: Gage County offices and candidates identified in official county and state filing snapshots, with current general-election listings separated from May 2026 primary history. Filing windows remain open and general-election contest status is not final.
filingWindowStatus: Open — the incumbent filing deadline is July 15, 2026, and the non-incumbent filing deadline is August 3, 2026.

publicMethodology.introduction: Different sources establish different facts. Candidate cards identify the source used for each displayed claim.
publicMethodology.registrationVerification: When available, Nebraska VoterCheck confirms a candidate’s voter-registration affiliation.
publicMethodology.primaryParticipation: A named partisan primary in the Gage County Electionware report confirms participation in that party’s primary contest. It does not confirm voter registration.
publicMethodology.filingInformation: Official county and state filing snapshots identify candidates currently listed for the general election. Filing remains open, so these snapshots do not establish a final contest.
publicMethodology.electionOutcomes: Gage County vote totals come from its Electionware report, which is labeled UNOFFICIAL RESULTS and covers Gage County reporting only. The official state canvass establishes statewide and multi-county primary nominees.
publicMethodology.stageSeparation: Current listings and primary history are shown separately so candidates who did not advance are not mistaken for current candidates.
publicMethodology.missingVerification: When an affiliation source has not been confirmed, the directory says “Verification Pending” or “Not Yet Confirmed.” No affiliation is inferred.

sources.name: Gage County Electionware Summary Results Report - 2026 Primary Election
sources.projectRole: Authoritative project source for Gage County reported primary participation, vote totals, outcomes, and election-status facts
sources.publicDescription: This county report is labeled UNOFFICIAL RESULTS. The project uses it as its authoritative source for the Gage County reporting shown here; county totals alone do not establish final statewide or multi-county district outcomes.
sources.scopeNote: Statewide, federal, legislative, and State Board totals are the Gage County portion only and cannot independently establish the full-district or statewide winner.

sources.name: Gage County 2026 Candidate Filing List
sources.publicDescription: The Gage County Election Office filing list identifies candidates currently filed for county, municipal, school, village, and township offices. The filing window is still open, so it does not establish a final general-election contest status.

sources.name: Gage County Notice of Offices to Be Filled at the 2026 General Election
sources.publicDescription: The notice identifies general-election offices, seats, terms, filing authorities, and the July 15 and August 3 filing deadlines applicable to the listed offices.

sources.name: Gage County Notice of Offices to Be Filled at the 2026 Primary Election
sources.publicDescription: The notice identifies offices appearing in the 2026 primary cycle, the number to be elected, partisan status, term length, and filing authority.

sources.name: Nebraska 2026 Statewide Candidate Filing List
sources.publicDescription: The Nebraska Secretary of State workbook identifies candidates currently listed for the 2026 general election. Candidate-access pathways remain open, so it does not establish a final general-election contest status.

sources.name: Nebraska Board of State Canvassers 2026 Primary Election Official Report
sources.publicDescription: The Nebraska Board of State Canvassers report identifies official 2026 primary nominees and statewide or districtwide primary outcomes.

sources.name: Gage County 2026 Primary Sample Ballots
sources.publicDescription: The county sample-ballot notice explains that candidates are declared nominated and omitted from the primary ballot when filings do not exceed the statutory primary threshold.
